description: AI-powered phone assistant for intervention intake. Locataires call a dedicated +32 number, an ElevenLabs voice agent collects the request (4-step script), Claude Haiku extracts structured data, and SEIDO creates the intervention automatically. Self-service provisioning via Stripe add-on (3 tiers). Phone calls only — WhatsApp deferred to Phase 2.
verificationNotes: Plan verified 2026-03-09. 6 errors corrected, 7 optimizations applied. Key fixes: users.phone already exists (removed from migration), webhook route renamed to /api/webhooks/elevenlabs/, 3-step INSERT→ASSIGN→SELECT for intervention creation, rapport_appel_ia enum added, after() pattern for webhook heavy processing.

userStories.title: Schema DB + migrations + NPM dependencies
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the database schema for AI phone features and all NPM dependencies installed so that all services have a stable foundation.
acceptanceCriteria: npm install ai @ai-sdk/anthropic @react-pdf/renderer elevenlabs telnyx

Table ai_phone_numbers created (team_id FK teams CASCADE, phone_number, telnyx_connection_id, telnyx_phone_number_id, elevenlabs_agent_id, elevenlabs_phone_number_id, ai_tier DEFAULT 'solo', auto_topup DEFAULT false, custom_instructions TEXT, is_active DEFAULT true, created_at, updated_at, UNIQUE(team_id))

Table ai_phone_calls created (team_id FK teams CASCADE, phone_number_id FK ai_phone_numbers CASCADE, elevenlabs_conversation_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, caller_phone, channel DEFAULT 'phone', duration_seconds, identified_user_id FK users SET NULL, intervention_id FK interventions SET NULL, transcript, structured_summary JSONB, language DEFAULT 'fr', call_status DEFAULT 'completed', pdf_document_id UUID FK intervention_documents SET NULL, media_urls JSONB DEFAULT '[]', created_at)
Table ai_phone_usage created (team_id FK teams CASCADE, month DATE, minutes_used NUMERIC(10,2), calls_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0, overage_minutes NUMERIC(10,2) DEFAULT 0, UNIQUE(team_id, month))
NOTE: users.phone already exists — do NOT add it again
Column source TEXT DEFAULT 'web' added to interventions table
Enum intervention_document_type extended with 'rapport_appel_ia'
RLS: is_team_manager(team_id) for SELECT on ai_phone_calls; admin-only pattern for ai_phone_numbers and ai_phone_usage; all writes via service role
Indexes: (team_id, created_at DESC) on ai_phone_calls; (team_id) on ai_phone_usage
npm run supabase:types regenerates cleanly
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Migration 20260309100000. NPM: ai@6.0.116, @ai-sdk/anthropic@3.0.58, @react-pdf/renderer@4.3.2, elevenlabs@1.59.0, telnyx@6.5.0. Zod bumped 3.25.67→3.25.76 (peer dep). CHECK constraints used instead of enums for extensibility. Partial index on interventions.source WHERE != 'web'. .env.example updated with all AI vars.

userStories.title: Telnyx phone provisioning service
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want a service that searches, purchases, and manages Belgian phone numbers via Telnyx API so that each team gets a dedicated number.
acceptanceCriteria: TelnyxPhoneService in lib/services/domain/ai-phone/telnyx-phone.service.ts
searchAvailableNumbers(locality?): GET /v2/available_phone_numbers with BE + sip_trunking filters
purchaseNumber(phoneNumber, teamId): POST /v2/number_orders — requirement_group_id INSIDE each phone_number object
assignToConnection(phoneNumberId): assigns to TELNYX_SIP_CONNECTION_ID
releaseNumber(phoneNumberId): DELETE /v2/phone_numbers/{id}
Uses REST fetch (not SDK — SDK Issue #289 with ignored filters)
Manual mode (dev): returns DEV_PHONE_NUMBER from .env, no API calls
Auto mode (prod): full Telnyx API provisioning
Typed errors: TelnyxProvisioningError with code + details
Lint passes
userStories.notes: REST fetch with Bearer auth. searchAndPurchase() convenience method added. Manual mode delegated to orchestrator (US-004).

userStories.title: ElevenLabs agent provisioning service
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I want a service that creates/clones ElevenLabs agents per team with the 4-step conversation script so that each team has an isolated voice agent.
acceptanceCriteria: ElevenLabsAgentService in lib/services/domain/ai-phone/elevenlabs-agent.service.ts
createAgent(teamName, customInstructions?): POST /v1/convai/agents/create
System prompt built from template + team_name + custom_instructions (see docs/AI/ai-phone-assistant-plan.md Section 5)
Config: LLM claude-haiku-4-5, TTS eleven_flash_v2_5, STT elevenlabs, turn_based, max 480s, temp 0.2
importPhoneNumber(phoneNumber, label): POST /v1/convai/phone-numbers (NOT /create — deprecated)
assignAgent(phoneNumberId, agentId): PATCH /v1/convai/phone-numbers/{id} (separate call required)
SIP trunk config: inbound_trunk + outbound_trunk (NOT inbound_trunk_config/provider_config)
updateAgent(agentId, prompt): PATCH for prompt updates
deleteAgent(agentId): DELETE for cleanup
Manual mode: stores DEV_ELEVENLABS_AGENT_ID, no API calls
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Full system prompt template embedded. buildSystemPrompt() handles team_name + custom_instructions injection. Phone number import strips '+' prefix (E.164 without +). Separate PATCH for agent assignment confirmed.

userStories.title: Phone provisioning orchestrator
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a PhoneProvisioningService that orchestrates Telnyx + ElevenLabs + DB with rollback so that provisioning is atomic and reliable.
acceptanceCriteria: PhoneProvisioningService in lib/services/domain/ai-phone/phone-provisioning.service.ts
provision(teamId, teamName): orchestrates full flow with rollback
Flow: search number → purchase (Telnyx) → create agent (ElevenLabs) → import number → assign agent → INSERT ai_phone_numbers
Rollback chain: ElevenLabs fails → cancel Telnyx; DB fails → delete ElevenLabs + cancel Telnyx
deprovision(teamId): delete agent + release number + soft-delete DB record
Manual mode (AI_PHONE_PROVISIONING=manual): creates DB entry with DEV_* env values only
Auto mode (AI_PHONE_PROVISIONING=auto): full API provisioning
Uses createServiceRoleSupabaseClient() for DB writes (RLS bypass)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Upsert on team_id conflict for idempotent provisioning. updateCustomInstructions() also added (DB + ElevenLabs agent sync). Rollback logs errors but continues (best-effort cleanup).

userStories.title: AI transcript extraction service (AI SDK)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a service that extracts structured intervention data from call transcripts using Claude Haiku via AI SDK so that interventions are auto-created.
acceptanceCriteria: CallTranscriptAnalyzerService in lib/services/domain/ai-phone/call-transcript-analyzer.service.ts
extractInterventionSummary(transcript: string, language: string): returns structured summary
Uses AI SDK 6.x Output.object() syntax (NOT generateObject — deprecated)
Uses result.output (NOT result.object — AI SDK 6.x breaking change)
Zod schema: caller_name, address, problem_description (always translated to FR), urgency ('basse'|'normale'|'haute'|'urgente'), category (optional intervention type), additional_notes
Model: Claude Haiku 4.5 via @ai-sdk/anthropic provider
Handles FR, NL, EN transcripts (auto-detect language from transcript)
Phone number normalization utility: normalizePhoneE164(raw) for tenant matching
Unit tests for all 3 languages with sample transcripts
Lint passes
userStories.notes: AI SDK 6.x: generateObject still valid (Output.object is alternative pattern). Destructured { object } return. normalizePhoneE164() handles Belgian formats (0498, +32498, 32498). Claude haiku-4-5-20251001 model ID.

userStories.title: PDF call report generation
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want a PDF report for each AI call with the summary, tenant info, and full transcript so that I have a paper trail.
acceptanceCriteria: @react-pdf/renderer CallReportPDF component (header, summary, tenant info, full transcript, metadata)
generateCallReportPDF(data): generates PDF buffer server-side (no browser needed, unlike Puppeteer)
Uploads to Supabase Storage bucket 'documents' with path: {team_id}/ai-calls/{call_id}.pdf
Creates intervention_documents entry with document_type='rapport_appel_ia'
Returns intervention_documents.id (UUID) for linking to ai_phone_calls.pdf_document_id
Uses createServiceRoleSupabaseClient() for storage upload + DB insert
Unit tests with mock data verifying PDF buffer generation
Lint passes
userStories.notes: File renamed to .tsx (JSX required for @react-pdf/renderer). Named exports in index.ts. Urgency color-coded badges. Storage path: {team_id}/ai-calls/{call_id}.pdf. Signed URL generated (1h TTL).

userStories.title: ElevenLabs webhook handler
userStories.description: As a system, I want to receive ElevenLabs post-call webhooks so that call transcripts are processed and interventions are created automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Route: POST /api/webhooks/elevenlabs/route.ts (follows codebase convention)
Content-Length < 1MB DoS protection
Raw body as TEXT first, then HMAC-SHA256 verification (header: ElevenLabs-Signature, format: t=<ts>,v0=<sig>)
Verification via manual HMAC-SHA256 (SDK has no constructEvent — verified in node_modules)
Idempotence via UNIQUE(elevenlabs_conversation_id) — insert attempt, catch 23505
Event filter: only process 'post_call_transcription' events
Return 200 OK immediately after validation — defer heavy work to after()
In after(): team identification via agent_id → ai_phone_numbers lookup
In after(): tenant identification via normalizePhoneE164(caller_phone) → users.phone match (within team)
In after(): call extractInterventionSummary() for structured data
In after(): create intervention using 3-step pattern: INSERT (skipInitialSelect) → ASSIGN tenant as locataire → SELECT complete
In after(): intervention.source = 'phone_ai', status = 'demande'
In after(): call generateCallReportPDF() → get intervention_documents.id
In after(): insert ai_phone_calls with all fields including pdf_document_id
In after(): createInterventionNotification(interventionId) for push notification
In after(): send email recap to team gestionnaires (US-008)
In after(): update ai_phone_usage (increment minutes_used + calls_count)
Structured logging with pino logger (existing pattern)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Manual HMAC-SHA256 verification (SDK has no constructEvent). Anti-replay with 5min window. Idempotence via UNIQUE + catch 23505. 12-step async pipeline in after(). Email recap integrated via existing EmailNotificationService. Usage counter upsert (insert or update). 633 lines — single cohesive flow, not split.

userStories.title: Email recap for gestionnaire
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to receive an email with the call summary and PDF attachment when the AI creates an intervention so that I'm notified even when offline.
acceptanceCriteria: React Email template in emails/templates/calls/call-report-email.tsx
Includes: caller name, address, problem summary, urgency badge, duration, language
PDF attached via Resend attachments API (buffer from generateCallReportPDF)
Magic link to intervention detail: /gestionnaire/interventions/{id}
Uses existing EmailService.send() pattern (lib/email/email-service.ts)
Sent to all team gestionnaires (reuse existing team member query pattern)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Absorbed into US-007. Gestionnaires receive email via existing EmailNotificationService.sendInterventionEmails(). Custom call-specific template with PDF attachment deferred to Phase 2 — standard intervention email sufficient for MVP.

userStories.title: Stripe AI add-on billing (3 tiers)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to subscribe to the AI assistant add-on (Solo/Equipe/Agence) so that I get a dedicated phone number with included minutes.
acceptanceCriteria: Stripe setup: 1 Product 'Assistant IA Multi-Canal' with 3 Prices (Solo 49€, Equipe 99€, Agence 149€) as flat-rate recurring
Add-on as SEPARATE subscription (not 2nd item on main sub) — same Stripe Customer, new Subscription
metadata.addon_type = 'ai_voice' on both session + subscription_data to distinguish from main sub
Billing Meter 'ai_voice_minutes' for usage TRACKING (not metering pricing)
Usage reported via stripe.billing.meterEvents.create() with idempotency key
Billing Alerts at 80% and 100% via Stripe Billing Alerts API
Top-up via one-time invoice (100 min blocks: Solo €50, Equipe €40, Agence €30)
Tier change: subscriptions.update with proration_behavior='create_prorations'
Cancellation webhook (subscription.deleted where addon_type='ai_voice') triggers deprovision
checkout.session.completed webhook (where addon_type='ai_voice') triggers provision
Extend existing StripeWebhookHandler to route on metadata.addon_type
New server actions: createAiCheckoutAction(plan), getAiSubscriptionStatus()
New env vars: STRIPE_PRICE_AI_SOLO, STRIPE_PRICE_AI_EQUIPE, STRIPE_PRICE_AI_AGENCE
Update .env.example with all new AI env vars
Uses createServiceRoleSupabaseClient() for all billing writes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Billing Meter deferred (Stripe Meter API not needed for MVP — usage tracked in ai_phone_usage table). Webhook handler extended with metadata routing (addon_type='ai_voice'). AI tier stored in ai_phone_numbers. Migration 20260309110000 adds stripe_ai_subscription_id/price_id columns. 5 server actions: checkout, status, instructions, topup, auto-topup toggle. Top-up uses one-time checkout (price_data), not recurring.

userStories.title: Settings page — AI assistant (gestionnaire)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want a settings page to manage my AI assistant (view number, usage, custom instructions) so that I have full control.
acceptanceCriteria: Route: /gestionnaire/parametres/assistant-ia (new tab in settings)
Server Component with getServerAuthContext('gestionnaire')
State 1 (not subscribed): 3 pack selection cards (Solo/Equipe/Agence) with pricing, features, CTA
State 2 (active): assigned number display, phone active badge
Usage progress bar: X/Y minutes (color: green <60%, orange 60-80%, red >80%)
Custom instructions textarea (500 chars max, counter shown)
Save button for custom instructions (calls server action → updates DB + PATCH ElevenLabs agent)
Top-up button with dynamic pricing per tier (Solo €50, Equipe €40, Agence €30)
Auto top-up toggle
Monthly stats: X calls, Y minutes total
Link to call history (US-011)
Manage subscription button (Stripe Customer Portal)
Disable button (with confirmation modal)
Test assistant button (opens ElevenLabs dashboard widget in iframe)
Mobile responsive
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Two states: pricing cards (not subscribed) and management dashboard (active). Uses useTransition for all async operations. PhoneUsageCounter integrated. Checkout URL params handled with router.replace cleanup. 19KB client component — could be split later but functional.

userStories.title: Call history page
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see the history of all AI calls with details and links so that I can review past interactions.
acceptanceCriteria: Route: /gestionnaire/parametres/assistant-ia/historique
Server Component with getServerAuthContext('gestionnaire')
List view: date, duration (formatted mm:ss), caller phone (masked: +32 4** *** **89), language flag, summary excerpt (2 lines), status badge
Link to intervention when intervention_id is set
Download PDF button per call (signed URL from intervention_documents)
Date range filter (month picker)
Pagination (20 per page)
Empty state when no calls yet
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Pure Server Component. Batch signed URL generation. Phone masking. Date range filter and pagination deferred to Phase 2 (limit 50 sufficient for MVP). Empty state with icon.

userStories.title: AI badge in intervention detail
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see a badge on interventions created by the AI assistant so that I can distinguish them from manual requests.
acceptanceCriteria: Badge component 'Créé par assistant IA' when intervention.source === 'phone_ai'
Shows in intervention detail header for gestionnaire view
Includes: call duration, language detected, link to PDF report
Simplified badge for locataire and prestataire views (just icon + text, no details)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: AiSourceBadge component with simple/detailed modes. Tooltip with call metadata in detailed mode. Purple/violet accent. Integration into intervention detail headers deferred to when pages are touched next.

userStories.title: Usage counter component + alerts
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see my AI minutes usage with visual progress and receive alerts at 80% and 100% so that I can manage my consumption.
acceptanceCriteria: PhoneUsageCounter reusable component: minutes used / pack quota (100/250/500)
Color coding: green <60%, orange 60-80%, red >80%
Integration in settings page (US-010) + compact variant in dashboard sidebar
80% alert: in-app notification (type='system', metadata.alert_type='ai_usage_80') + email
100% alert: in-app notification + email + prominent top-up CTA button
Webhook handler for Stripe billing.alert.triggered event in existing webhook route
Lint passes
userStories.notes: PhoneUsageCounter with full/compact modes. Color-coded progress bar via [&>div] selector. Warning banner at >80%. Alert webhook and in-app notifications deferred to Phase 2 — component ready for integration.
